meta.title: StatMatik — 2026 World Championship
meta.description: The ultimate guide to the 2026 World Championship — 48 teams, 12 groups, three host nations. Countdown to the June 11, 2026 kickoff.
meta.ogTitle: 2026 World Championship — The World's Biggest Show
meta.ogDescription: 48 teams. 12 groups. 3 host countries. Countdown to June 11, 2026 has begun.

hero.title: The World
hero.subtitle: USA · Canada · Mexico — three nations, one tournament, history in the making.
hero.minMatPromo: Refresh your mind while waiting for the match! 🧠 Try our MinMat Math & Memory Game.
hero.cupMatPromo: Is your football knowledge better than AI? 🏆 Make your 2026 World Championship predictions with CupMat now!
hero.slogan: Football is math, math is everything. Solve the math of football with statmatik.com!
hero.cupMatDesc: AI-powered, everything about the 2026 World Championship!
hero.minMatDesc: Brain game that will make it easier for you and your children to calculate from memory!

overview.sectionSubtitle: The largest World Cup ever — expanded format, three hosts, unforgettable moments await.

teams.label: Teams
teams.description: The largest field in World Championship history

groups.label: Groups
groups.description: Round-robin of four in each group

teams.title: Participating Teams
teams.subtitle: 48 nations across groups A–L, world ranking, and squad details.

groups.title: Groups & Standings
groups.subtitle: Tables update instantly by points, GD, and goals scored as results are entered.
groups.resultsHint: Update the scores — standings across 12 groups are recalculated instantly.

venues.title: Host Stadiums
venues.subtitle: 16 official stadiums across North America — capacity, location, and match schedule.

predictions.title: Predictions & Leaderboard
predictions.subtitle: Submit group scores step-by-step, unlock the Round of 32 bracket, and compete in the global ranking.
predictions.knockoutLocked: Complete all group predictions and apply scores — the knockout bracket will unlock.

footer.tagline: 2026 World Championship — For the love of the game.

pwa.title: Add MahTEM to Home Screen
pwa.instructionShare: Tap the Share icon in the Safari bottom menu.
pwa.instructionAdd: Scroll down and select 'Add to Home Screen'.

statsPage.title: Tournament Statistics
statsPage.subtitle: Analyze player ages, heights, weights, club representations, and historical World Cup records.
statsPage.liveNote: These stats will update live automatically once the tournament matches kickoff.
statsPage.emptyData: Loading data or no statistics available.

gamification.leaderboardDesc: An exciting 3-day period race consisting of the sum of the Fan Points you collect by browsing the site and your Prediction Points (10x multiplier)!
gamification.noParticipants: No users have participated in this period yet. Be the first to earn points!
gamification.guestPrompt: Log in to see your own position in the rankings and win period race rewards!
gamification.cupMatRewardsDesc: MinMat rewards to be given to those who enter the top 3 of this period are only active in the next 3-day period.
gamification.noEligibleUsers: No eligible users in this period yet.
gamification.minMatRewardsDesc: The CupMat bonus to be given to the MinMat top 3 this period is only valid in the next 3-day period.
gamification.noPastChampions: There is no completed period yet. First champions will be listed in 3 days!

minMat.rank1: +50 global points and 5 prediction change rights in CupMat
minMat.rank2: +30 global points and 3 prediction change rights in CupMat
minMat.rank3: +15 global points and 1 prediction change right in CupMat

customRewards.cupmatPtsRights: +{pts} global points and {rights} prediction change rights in CupMat
